basic_details.job_title: Akola Urban Cooperative Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Sr Bank Officer and Relationship Manager & Marketing Executives Posts
basic_details.short_information: Akola Urban Cooperative Bank Recruitment 2026: Akola Urban Cooperative Bank has released the official notification for Sr Bank Officer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid banking jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Sr Bank Officer: Chartered Accountant with experience in GST & TDS and preference to experience in Banking operation.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Relationship Manager & Marketing Executives and Sr Bank Officer

salary_details.pay_scale: Salary & Allowances will be decided in interview if selected
salary_details.details: Salary & Allowances will be decided in interview if selected

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Akola Urban Cooperative Bank Sr Bank Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Akola Urban Cooperative Bank to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sr Bank Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Sr Bank Officer position at Akola Urban Cooperative Bank is 15th June 2026. Candidates are urged to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Sr Bank Officer role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Sr Bank Officer position, candidates must be Chartered Accountants. Preference will be given to those with experience in GST & TDS and banking operations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Sr Bank Officer post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Sr Bank Officer position is below 50 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms, though not detailed in the provided summary.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Sr Bank Officer position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Sr Bank Officer post advertised by Akola Urban Cooperative Bank. This single opening is for the combined role of Relationship Manager & Marketing Executives and Sr Bank Officer.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process involves uploading your application and bio-data in the given format on the bank's website. Additionally, hard copies of your application, bio-data, and documents must be sent to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Sr Bank Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Sr Bank Officer position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience before being called for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read the PDF thoroughly for complete details.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an application fee for the Sr Bank Officer post?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Akola, Maharashtra, with the pincode 444001. The bank's address for sending hard copies is also provided in the application instructions.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary offered for the Sr Bank Officer position?
faq.answer: The salary and allowances for the Sr Bank Officer post will be decided during the interview process if the candidate is selected. No fixed salary is mentioned in the initial notification.
